items.request_and_intent: The workflow was triggered to take a product idea for a mobile expense tracker app (ExpenseTrack) for small business owners and produce a complete inception package — vision document, structured requirements, and epic decomposition with sprint planning.
execution_flow: L1-inception-vision-generator: Generated a 5-section vision document for ExpenseTrack covering 5 feature areas, 7 MVP features, 4 risks, and 3 open questions. Uploaded as markdown artifact.
L1-inception-requirements-extractor: Extracted 8 functional requirements, 4 non-functional requirements, 2 constraints, 3 assumptions, and 2 gaps from the vision document. Prioritised using MoSCoW.
L1-inception-epics-generator: Decomposed requirements into 4 epics with 12 features allocated across 3 sprints. Achieved 100% requirements coverage.
artifacts_and_content: 8 functional requirements with MoSCoW priority and acceptance-level detail
4 epics (Receipt Capture & OCR, Expense Categorisation, Budget Management, Reporting & Insights)
12 features mapped to epics with sprint allocation across 3 sprints
items.outcome: Workflow completed successfully. All 3 agents passed. Delivered a complete inception package: vision document, 8 FRs + 4 NFRs, and 4 epics across 3 sprints with 100% requirements coverage. 2 gaps remain open for stakeholder input (authentication method, supported currencies).

metadata.reasoning: All 3 agent execution_summaries were detailed with explicit counts, KB references, guardrail results, and tool outcomes. High confidence in accuracy.
